view.title: Royal Petition {id}
view.subject: Subject
view.emailDisabled: Your pigeon post address ({email}) has been disabled. Please consult
view.allowServerAccess: Allow InterServer to modify castle keep:
view.ipHelpText: If connection is coming from different garrison coordinates. Kindly change it.
view.passwordEncrypted: Secret Sigils are stored in a separate encrypted vault.
view.ticketClosed: This royal petition is dismissed, so replies are disabled. If you still require assistance, feel free to open a new royal petition and we shall be happy to help.
view.replyPlaceholder: Detailed proclamation about the matter at hand
view.replyHint: Presenting separate petitions for new matters helps our royal court prioritize and resolve them faster.
view.closeConfirmText: Do you wish to dismiss this royal petition?

new.title: New Royal Petition
new.subject: Subject
new.subjectValidation: Please enter a brief description about the matter at hand.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: The Crown thanks thee for helping us maintain a streamlined royal petition system by submitting one request per petition.
new.descriptionValidation: Please enter a detailed description about the matter at hand.
new.fileNote: Note: Only image parchments — gif/jpeg/png types are allowed.
new.allowAccessLabel: I allow InterServer to access my castle keep and perform modifications
new.accessNote: Please note: By opening a royal petition InterServer may need to access, investigate, or modify scrolls in your account. This requirement is needed in order to provide royal assistance. Please only proceed if you agree.
